hero.description: Professional web design, SEO, and digital marketing at plans built for entrepreneurs and startups ready to make their mark online.

about.heading: About Us
about.tagline: Turning business visions into exceptional digital experiences
about.missionP1: At Saki Lab, we believe every entrepreneur deserves access to high-quality professional design — without breaking the bank. Our team blends creativity, technology, and strategy to build digital experiences that drive real business growth.
about.missionP2: With over 5 years in the market, we've helped more than 50 entrepreneurs and startups establish their digital presence and hit their business goals.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: We leverage the latest technologies and trends to deliver modern, efficient solutions that keep you ahead of the curve.

quality.title: Quality
quality.description: Every project gets hands-on attention and is delivered to the highest standards — no shortcuts, no templates.

accessibility.title: Affordability
accessibility.description: Flexible plans designed so any entrepreneur or small business can access professional-grade services.

services.heading: Our Services
services.subheading: End-to-end technology solutions built to grow your business — from web development to cloud infrastructure, we've got you covered at every step.
services.customDesc: Every project is different. We work alongside you to craft technology solutions that fit your business perfectly — no one-size-fits-all packages.

webDev.name: Web Development
webDev.description: We build modern, responsive, high-performance websites that stand out in the digital marketplace — from landing pages to full-scale web applications.

cloud.name: AWS Cloud Projects
cloud.description: We deploy scalable cloud solutions on Amazon Web Services — covering architecture design, migration, and ongoing infrastructure optimization.

consulting.name: IT Consulting
consulting.description: Strategic technology advisory to streamline your processes, boost efficiency, and make confident decisions about your digital infrastructure.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.subheading: Ready to bring your idea to life? Reach out for a free consultation and let's talk about how we can help your business grow.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your project and how we can help...

footer.description: Design studio specialized in entrepreneurs and startups. We transform ideas into exceptional digital experiences with affordable plans and professional support.
